narrative:
East-Cleveland municipal court district has 9,331 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 0.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 40.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 39.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.0% D−R vs +57.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
